message:
Fix clippy pedantic warnings

- Move use statements to top of benchmark functions (fix items_after_statements)
- Add #[must_use] to logging::is_enabled()
- Add #[allow(clippy::needless_pass_by_value)] for macro-generated handlers

bd-2rx
